name: Cross-Module Content Syndication
description: When Module C long-form content is approved, auto-creates Module B social calendar entries for all 8 repurposed derivatives and schedules across 4 platforms over 14 days via Buffer.

config.description: Generate all 8 derivative assets in single Nemotron pass

payload.prompt: Repurpose the following approved content into 8 derivative assets. Source title: {{trigger.title}}. Source script: {{trigger.script}}. Generate all 8 in this exact format: ASSET_1: Full script (original). ASSET_2: 60-second short-form hook cut. ASSET_3: LinkedIn long-form article adaptation. ASSET_4: Instagram carousel outline (5-7 slides). ASSET_5: Facebook post (short form, 150 words). ASSET_6: Email newsletter segment. ASSET_7: Podcast talking point expansion. ASSET_8: YouTube description and chapter breakdown.

config.code: const output_text = inputData.nemotron_output; const assets = output_text.split(/ASSET_\d+:/).filter(a => a.trim()); const platforms = ['Instagram', 'Facebook', 'LinkedIn', 'YouTube']; const schedule = []; const baseDate = new Date(); for (let i = 0; i < assets.length; i++) { const postDate = new Date(baseDate); postDate.setDate(postDate.getDate() + (i * 2)); schedule.push({ asset_number: i + 1, content: assets[i]?.trim(), platform: platforms[i % platforms.length], scheduled_date: postDate.toISOString().split('T')[0], status: 'Draft' }); } output = { derivatives: schedule, total: schedule.length, span_days: 14, source_title: inputData.source_title };

config.message: CONTENT SYNDICATION | {{step2.source_title}} | {{step2.total}} derivatives created | Scheduled across {{step2.span_days}} days | All posted to Content Calendar as Draft for CEO review
